data.title: StarkWare to reduce staff to focus on revenue; splitting into 2 units under CEO Eli Ben-Sasson for faster growth.
data.description: Eli Ben-Sasson, the CEO of StarkWare, announced the company's decision to divide into two separate units in order to transition into a more agile and efficient "startup mode."

data.title: Bitcoin mining is consolidating, while AI could become more decentralized due to edge computing and open-source principles.
data.description: The concentration of Bitcoin mining is increasing, resulting in a more centralized network. On the other hand, the advancement of Artificial Intelligence (AI) may experience a counter trend, moving towards decentralization. This shift is propelled by edge computing and open-source frameworks. The current rise in Bitcoin mining centralization is a growing concern within the industry. However, in contrast, AI development is moving towards a more distributed approach, with edge computing and open-source models playing a crucial role. This trend signifies a potential divergence in centralization between the two technologies.

data.title: Ada Health Patents the Clinical Layer That Makes LLMs Safe for Healthcare
data.description: Ada Health has been granted a patent by the European Patent Office (EPO) for its hybrid AI architecture. This innovative approach involves combining the capabilities of large language models with clinical accuracy, transparency, and adherence to regulations. The patent was awarded in Berlin on April 13, 2026.

data.title: Growvana Becomes Title Sponsor of Amplify Beginning in 2026, Deepening Its Commitment to the Next Generation of High-Growth Consumer Brands
data.description: Growvana has secured a noteworthy long-term title sponsorship deal with a leading network in the DTC, retail, and CPG industries. This strategic partnership places Growvana at the forefront of discussions, networking opportunities, and key business decisions that are instrumental in defining the future of commerce. The deal was announced in Dallas and Chicago on April 13, 2026, showcasing the significance of this collaboration in the industry. This move is expected to significantly boost Growvana's visibility and influence within the sector, further solidifying its position as a key player in shaping the future of commerce.

data.title: Grant Thornton survey: A widening ‘AI proof gap’ is emerging, but well-governed AI is showing results
data.description: In Chicago, a recent survey conducted by Grant Thornton highlighted a concerning "AI proof gap" in the business world. This term refers to a disparity between the substantial investments being made in AI technology and the corresponding lack of accountability. Tom Puthiyamadam, the managing partner of Advisory Services at Grant Thornton Advisors LLC, emphasized this issue, stating that despite the significant financial commitments to AI, there is a noticeable absence of accountability measures. The survey findings indicated that although a majority of companies have integrated AI solutions, numerous teams struggle to quantify the actual impact or results produced by this technology.

data.title: Register for Responsible Flushing Alliance’s 2026 Annual Virtual Meeting
data.description: The Responsible Flushing Alliance (RFA) will hold its fifth annual meeting on Wednesday, April 15, from 10 to 11 a.m. PDT. The hour-long virtual event is free to attend. During the meeting, attendees can expect to gain insights into various topics including available educational resources, federal legislative updates, outcomes from the #FlushSmart Potty Training for Grown-Ups initiative, and a preview of the upcoming 2026 Flush Smart Month campaign set for July.

data.title: Wize Solutions Completes More Than 11,000 Installation Projects
data.description: In Atlanta, Wize Solutions, a rapidly growing warehouse installation company, has successfully finished its 11,000th project. Specializing in various installations like pallet racks and dock doors, Wize Solutions excels in handling projects of all sizes and types across every state in the US. Unlike other installers who rely on temporary workers for out-of-state projects, Wize Solutions exclusively uses its own employees for installation tasks.

data.title: Aramark Employees Unite for Global Day of Service Across Four Continents
data.description: In Philadelphia, numerous Aramark employees globally are preparing to participate in Aramark Building Community Day (ABC Day) on April 16. This event serves as the company's annual Global Day of Service, with volunteers in the United States and 12 other countries joining forces to aid over 100 community organizations. Activities will include neighborhood beautification, revitalization projects, and assembling meal and hygiene kits. ABC Day underscores Aramark's ongoing dedication towards the communities it serves.

data.title: Stack BTC, endorsed by Nigel Farage, acquires $2.7M worth of Bitcoin for its treasury amid UK's tightening regulations on crypto donations.
data.description: Stack BTC, supported by Nigel Farage, has acquired $2.7 million worth of Bitcoin. This move further solidifies the cryptocurrency connections of the leader of Reform UK at a time when the UK is taking steps to restrict crypto contributions.

data.title: Sciton Inc. Earns 2026 USA TODAY Top Workplaces Award
data.description: In Palo Alto, California, on April 13, 2026, Sciton Inc., a prominent producer of medical and aesthetic laser and light technologies, was delighted to reveal its receipt of the 2026 USA TODAY Top Workplaces award. This marks the fifth occasion the company has been honored with this title.

data.title: CESNET and Ribbon Achieve Successful Proof of Concept in Quantum-Secured Optical Networking
data.description: Ribbon Communications Inc., a prominent company specializing in real-time communications technology and IP optical networking solutions, recently unveiled a groundbreaking achievement in Plano, Texas on April 13, 2026. The company showcased the practicality and efficiency of quantum encryption technology without compromising performance. This development is significant as it eliminates the common tradeoffs associated with implementing quantum encryption. Ribbon Communications Inc., listed on Nasdaq as RBBN, demonstrated the feasibility of this advanced encryption method, marking a notable advancement in the field of data security and communication technology.

data.title: Kaspi.kz to Announce 1st Quarter 2026 Financial Results on 11th May
data.description: Almaty, Kazakhstan - On April 13, 2026, Kaspi.kz (KSPI US) announced that it will disclose its financial performance for the quarter closing on March 31, 2026, on Monday, May 11, 2026. The management is scheduled to conduct a conference call and webcast at 8:00 am EST on the same day to examine and converse about the company's outcomes for that quarter.
